title: Out of memory after several transactions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE order_table (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, test_id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO order_table (order_id, test_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.50), (2, 2, 200.75), (3, NULL, 150.00);
SELECT * FROM order_table WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM order_table) ORDER BY amount DESC;
key_bug_features: Memory exhaustion after multiple data ordering transactions
